== Notes for [[Item:Q98672|Q98672]] ==

Progenitor of Bani ''Najjaar'' Tribe. (Part of ''Banu al-Khazrajiyya'' Tribe).

''Najjaar'' translated to '''Carpenter''' in Arabic, indicating family profession of this family/ tribe.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6702EC9F16CDC1EFBBF89829A6488A4DC01F
geni:6000000015141276206

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
